e: Used for permanent magnets. / sthayi chumbak ke liye upyog.

q: What is 'Hysteresis Loss' in a transformer core minimized by?\ntransformer core mein 'hysteresis hani' kaise kam ki jati hai?
o: Using soft iron | narm lohe ka upyog karke
e: Soft iron has a narrow B-H loop. / narm lohe ka B-H loop patla hota hai.

q: What is the speed of light in vacuum related to $\mu_0$?\nnirvat mein prakash ki chaal $\mu_0$ se kaise judi hai?
e: Fundamental electromagnetic relation. / maulik vidyut chumbakiya sambandh.

q: What is 'Magnetic Permeability' of a 'Ferromagnetic' substance?\nek 'louh-chumbakiya' padarth ki 'chumbakiya pargamyata' kya hoti hai?
e: They amplify the magnetic field significantly. / ye chumbakiya kshetra ko kaafi badha dete hain.

q: What is the value of '$\mu_0$' (Permeability of free space)?\n'$\mu_0$' ka maan kya hai?
e: Universal magnetic constant. / sarvabhumik chumbakiya niyatank.

q: What is 'Intensity of Magnetization' unit?\n'chumbakan ki teevrata' ki ikai kya hai?
e: Magnetic moment per unit volume. / prati ikai aaytan chumbakiya aghurn.

q: What is 'Self Inductance' unit Henry in terms of 'Volt, Second, Ampere'?\n'Volt, Second, Ampere' ke sandarbh mein 'Henry' kya hai?
e: Derived from $e = L(dI/dt)$. / $e = L(dI/dt)$ se vyutpann.

q: What is 'Magnetic Potential' unit?\n'chumbakiya vibhav' ki ikai kya hai?
e: Analogous to electric potential. / vidyut vibhav ke saman.

q: Which device uses 'Electromagnetic Induction' to stop a moving wheel?\ngatiman pahiye ko rokne ke liye kaun sa upkaran 'vidyut chumbakiya preran' ka upyog karta hai?
e: Eddy currents create drag. / bhanwar dharayen khinchav paida karti hain.

q: What is the 'Flux' unit in CGS?\nCGS mein 'flux' ki ikai kya hai?
e: 1 Wb = $10^8$ Maxwell.

q: What is 'Tesla' in terms of Gauss?\nGauss ke sandarbh mein 'Tesla' kya hai?
e: 1 Tesla = 10,000 Gauss.

q: What is 'Curie's Law' constant unit?\n'curie ke niyam' ke niyatank ki ikai kya hai?
e: From $\chi = C/T$. / $\chi = C/T$ se.

q: Which part of ear is 'Pinna'?\nkaan ka kaun sa bhag 'pinna' hai?
e: Revision: Collects sound waves. / revision: dhwani tarangein ikatha karta hai.

q: What is 'Magnetic Susceptibility' for a 'Perfect Diamagnet'?\nek 'purn prati-chumbak' ke liye 'chumbakiya pravritti' kya hai?
e: Total expulsion of field lines. / kshetra rekhaon ka purn nishkasan.

q: What is 'Mutual Inductance' of two coils if current changes by 2A/s and EMF is 10V?\nदो कुंडलियों का अन्योन्य प्रेरकत्व क्या होगा यदि करंट 2A/s से बदलता है और EMF 10V है?
What is 'Flux Leakage' in a transformer?\ntransformer mein 'flux leakage' kya hai?
o: Loss of energy | oorja ki hani
e: Primary flux not linking secondary. / prathmik flux ka dwitiyak se na judna.

q: Which 'Rule' gives the direction of 'Induced Current'?\n'prerit dhara' ki disha kaun sa niyam deta hai?
e: Opposes the change in flux. / flux badlav ka virodh karta hai.

q: What is 'Step-up Transformer' efficiency?\ntransformer ki dakshta ka sutra kya hai?
o: Output Power / Input Power | output shakti / input shakti
e: Ratio of power levels. / shakti staron ka anupat.

q: What is the speed of sound in 'Aluminium'?\n'aluminium' mein dhwani ki chaal kya hai?
e: Revision: High speed in solids. / revision: thoson mein uchh gati.

q: What is 'Magnetic Susceptibility' of 'Antimony'?\n'antimony' ki chumbakiya pravritti kya hai?
e: It is a diamagnetic substance. / ye ek prati-chumbakiya padarth hai.

q: Which material is used for 'Magnetic Shielding'?\n'chumbakiya parirakshan' ke liye kya upyog hota hai?
e: High permeability alloy. / uchh pargamyata wali mishra dhatu.

q: What is 'Aclinic Line'?\n'aclinic rekha' kya hai?
e: Line of zero dip. / shunya nati kon wali rekha.

q: What is 'Self Inductance' of a long solenoid proportional to?\nek lambi perinalika ka sw-prerakatva kiske samanupati hai?
e: Inductance increases with square of turns. / phero ke varg ke saath badhta hai.

q: What is 'Energy' in an inductor?\nprerak mein sanchit 'oorja' kya hai?
e: Stored in magnetic field. / chumbakiya kshetra mein sanchit.

q: What is 'Hysteresis Loop' area for steel compared to soft iron?\nsoft iron ki tulna mein steel ka hysteresis loop kshetraphal kya hai?
e: Steel has more energy loss per cycle. / steel mein prati chakra zyada oorja hani hoti hai.

q: Which 'Rule' gives the direction of force on a moving charge?\ngatiman avesh par bal ki disha kaun sa niyam deta hai?
o: Fleming's Left-hand rule | Fleming ka baayein hath ka niyam
e: Thumb = Force, Forefinger = Field. / angutha = bal, tarjani = kshetra.

q: What is 'Magnetic Induction' at center of circular loop?\nvrittakar loop ke kendra par chumbakiya preran kya hai?
e: Field is strongest at the center. / kendra par kshetra sabse mazboot hota hai.

q: What is the 'Flux' linkage for 50 turns with 0.1 Wb flux each?\n50 phero ka flux linkage kya hoga yadi har phere mein 0.1 Wb hai?
What is 'Self Inductance' of a straight wire?\nseedhe tar ka sw-prerakatva kya hai?
e: Inductance depends on loop geometry. / prerakatva loop ki jyamiti par nirbhar karta hai.

q: What is 'Magnetic Susceptibility' of 'Liquid Oxygen'?\n'liquid oxygen' ki chumbakiya pravritti kya hai?
e: Oxygen is paramagnetic. / oxygen anu-chumbakiya hai.

q: What is 'Coercivity' of soft iron?\nsoft iron ki 'nigrahita' (Coercivity) kya hai?
e: Easy to demagnetize. / vichumbakit karna aasan hai.

q: Which part of ear has 'Hammer' bone?\nkaan ke kis bhag mein 'hammer' haddi hoti hai?
e: Revision point. / revision point.

q: What is 'Tesla' unit for?\n'Tesla' kiski ikai hai?
e: Standard SI unit. / manak SI ikai.

q: What is the 'Flux' through 10 turns with 1 Weber flux each?\n10 phero ka flux linkage kya hoga yadi har phere mein 1 Weber hai?
e: Total linkage is $N\Phi$. / kul linkage $N\Phi$ hai.

q: What happens to the 'Magnetic Susceptibility' of a Ferromagnetic material when it is heated above its Curie temperature?\nLauh-chumbakiya padarth ko Curie tapman se upar garam karne par uski 'chumbakiya pravritti' ka kya hota hai?
o: Follows Curie-Weiss Law (becomes paramagnetic) | Curie-Weiss niyam ka palan karti hai (anu-chumbakiya ho jati hai)
e: Above Curie point, the alignment is lost and it behaves like a paramagnetic material. / Curie bindu se upar, sanrekhan khatam ho jata hai aur ye anu-chumbakiya ki tarah vyavhar karta hai.

q: What is the 'SI Unit' of Magnetic Intensity (H)?\nChumbakiya teevrata (H) ki 'SI ikai' kya hai?
e: H represents the magnetizing force, distinct from B (induction). / H chumbakan bal ko darshata hai.

q: Which component of 'Maxwell's Equations' states that there are no 'Magnetic Monopoles'?\nMaxwell ke samikaranon ka kaun sa bhag batata hai ki 'chumbakiya ekal dhruv' nahi hote?
o: Gauss's Law for Magnetism ($\nabla \cdot B = 0$) | Magnetism ke liye Gauss ka niyam
e: The divergence of the magnetic field is always zero. / Chumbakiya kshetra ka divergence hamesha shunya hota hai.

q: What is the 'Lorentz Force' direction for an electron moving North in a field pointing Upwards?\nEk electron jo Uttar ki aur ja raha hai aur kshetra Upar ki aur hai, us par 'Lorentz bal' ki disha kya hogi?
e: Using Fleming's Left Hand Rule and accounting for negative charge. / Fleming ke baayein hath ke niyam aur rinatmak avesh ko dhyan mein rakhte hue.

q: What is the 'Work Done' by a magnetic field on a stationary charge?\nEk sthir avesh par chumbakiya kshetra dwara kiya gaya 'karya' kya hota hai?
e: Magnetic fields only exert force on moving charges. / Chumbakiya kshetra sirf gatiman aveshon par bal lagate hain.

q: Which material has a 'Permeability' less than that of free space ($\mu < \mu_0$)?\nKis padarth ki 'pargamyata' mukt sthan se kam hoti hai?
e: Diamagnetic materials oppose the external field slightly. / Prati-chumbakiya padarth baahri kshetra ka thoda virodh karte hain.

q: What is 'Magnetic Hysteresis' primarily caused by?\n'Chumbakiya hysteresis' ka mukhya karan kya hai?
o: Molecular friction / Domain realignment delay | Domain sanrekhan mein deri
e: Internal friction between magnetic domains causes energy loss. / Chumbakiya domains ke beech ka aantrik gharshan oorja hani paida karta hai.

q: What is 'Self Inductance' of a coil of 200 turns if current of 2A produces 1 Wb flux linkage?\n200 phero wali coil ka sw-prerakatva kya hai yadi 2A current 1 Wb flux linkage paida kare?
e: $L = \text{Total Flux Linkage} / \text{Current} = 1 / 2 = 0.5$ H. / Sw-prerakatva = kul flux linkage / current.

q: What is the 'Effective Length' of a bar magnet compared to its 'Geometric Length'?\nEk bar chumbak ki 'prabhavi lambai' uski 'jyamitiya lambai' ki tulna mein kya hoti hai?
e: Poles are slightly inside the ends of the magnet. / Dhruv chumbak ke kinaron se thoda andar hote hain.

q: Which 'Law' is used to define the unit of magnetic flux 'Weber'?\nChumbakiya flux ki ikai 'Weber' ko paribhashit karne ke liye kis 'niyam' ka upyog hota hai?
e: 1 Weber is the flux that induces 1 Volt in 1 second. / 1 Weber wo flux hai jo 1 second mein 1 Volt prerit karta hai.

q: What is 'Magnetic Susceptibility' for a 'Perfect Diamagnet' like a Superconductor?\nSuperconductor jaise 'purn prati-chumbak' ke liye 'chumbakiya pravritti' kya hai?
e: Perfectly cancels the internal magnetic field (Meissner Effect). / Aantrik chumbakiya kshetra ko puri tarah khatam kar deta hai.

q: Which part of ear is the 'Cochlea'?\nKaan ka 'Cochlea' kaun sa bhag hai?
e: Revision: Hearing organ. / Revision point.

q: What is the 'Energy Density' of a magnetic field B in vacuum?\nNirvat mein chumbakiya kshetra B ki 'oorja ghnatv' kya hai?
e: Energy stored per unit volume in the field. / Kshetra mein prati ikai aaytan sanchit oorja.

q: What is 'Remanence' in a magnetic cycle?\nChumbakiya chakra mein 'Remanence' kya hai?
o: Magnetism remaining at zero field | Shunya kshetra par bacha hua chumbaktva
e: Also called residual magnetism. / Ise avshesh chumbaktva bhi kehte hain.

q: Which device uses 'Mutual Induction' to transfer energy between circuits?\nCircuit ke beech oorja sthanantaran ke liye kaun sa upkaran 'anyonya preran' ka upyog karta hai?
e: Transfers power via magnetic coupling. / Chumbakiya coupling ke madyam se power transfer karta hai.

q: What happens to the speed of sound in 'Steel' if its temperature increases?\nSteel mein dhwani ki chaal ka kya hoga yadi uska tapman badh jaye?
e: Revision: Speed in solids generally increases with temperature. / Revision point.

q: What is the 'Magnetic Dip' angle at the 'Magnetic Poles' of Earth?\nPrithvi ke 'chumbakiya dhruvon' par 'nati kon' kitna hota hai?
e: The field is strictly vertical at the poles. / Dhruvon par kshetra bilkul lumbvat hota hai.

q: What is 'Tesla' in terms of 'Gauss'?\n'Tesla' Gauss ke sandarbh mein kya hai?
e: 1 Tesla = 10,000 Gauss. / 1 Tesla = 10,000 Gauss.

q: What is 'Step-up Transformer' effect on 'Secondary Current'?\nStep-up transformer ka 'secondary current' par kya prabhav padta hai?
e: To conserve power, current must drop as voltage rises. / Voltage badhne par current ghatna chahiye.

q: Which material is used for 'Core' of permanent magnets?\nSthayi chumbak ke 'Core' ke liye kis padarth ka upyog hota hai?
e: Requires high coercivity. / Uchh nigrahita ki zarurat hoti hai.

q: What is the 'SI Unit' of intensity of magnetization ($M$)?\nChumbakan ki teevrata (M) ki 'SI ikai' kya hai?
e: Magnetic moment per unit volume. / Prati ikai aaytan chumbakiya aghurn.

q: What is 'Magnetic Potential' at a point on the equatorial line of a magnet?\nChumbak ki nirakshiya rekha par kisi bindu par 'chumbakiya vibhav' kya hai?
e: Potential from N and S poles cancel each other. / N aur S dhruvon se vibhav ek dusre ko khatam kar dete hain.

q: Which rule gives the direction of 'Induced Current' in a generator?\nGenerator mein 'prerit dhara' ki disha kaun sa niyam deta hai?
o: Fleming's Right-hand rule | Fleming ka daayein hath ka niyam
e: Used for generators (Left hand is for motors). / Generator ke liye upyog hota hai.

q: What is 'Self Inductance' of a long solenoid proportional to 'Number of turns' ($N$)?\nEk lambi perinalika ka 'sw-prerakatva' phero ki sankhya (N) ke saath kaise badalta hai?
e: Inductance depends on the square of the turns. / Prerakatva phero ke varg par nirbhar karta hai.

q: What is 'Agonic Line'?\n'Agonic Line' kya hai?
e: Line joining places where magnetic north and true north coincide. / Shunya chumbakiya dikpat wale sthano ko jodne wali rekha.

q: What is 'Relative Permeability' ($\mu_r$) of a paramagnetic material?\nAnu-chumbakiya padarth ki 'sapeksh pargamyata' ($\mu_r$) kya hoti hai?
e: Slightly greater than unity. / Ek se thodi adhik.

q: What is 'Eddy Current' loss in transformer minimized by?\nTransformer mein 'Eddy current' nuksan kaise kam kiya jata hai?
o: Lamination of core | Core ka lamination
e: Using thin insulated sheets to break current loops. / Current loops ko todne ke liye patli insulated sheets ka upyog.

q: What is 'Magnetic Susceptibility' of 'Water'?\n'Pani' ki chumbakiya pravritti kya hai?
e: Water is a diamagnetic substance. / Pani ek prati-chumbakiya padarth hai.

q: Which part of ear has 'Stirrup' bone?\nKaan ke kis bhag mein 'Stirrup' haddi hoti hai?
e: Revision: Part of middle ear ossicles. / Revision point.

q: What is the 'Flux' through a unit area called?\nIkai kshetraphal se guzarne wala 'Flux' kya kehlata hai?
e: Also known as magnetic flux density. / Ise flux ghnatv bhi kehte hain.

q: What is the speed of EM waves in vacuum approx?\nNirvat mein EM tarango ki chaal kya hai?
e: Travel at light speed. / Prakash ki chaal se chalti hain.

q: What is 'Hysteresis Loop' area representing?\n'Hysteresis Loop' ka kshetraphal kya darshata hai?
o: Energy loss per cycle | Prati chakra oorja hani
e: Heat loss during magnetization/demagnetization cycle. / Chumbakan/vichumbakan chakra mein ushma hani.

q: What is 'Mutual Inductance' of two coils if current changes by 5A/s and EMF is 10V?\nDo coils ka anyonya prerakatva kya hoga yadi current 5A/s se badle aur EMF 10V ho?
Which material is used for 'Magnetic Shielding'?\n'Chumbakiya parirakshan' ke liye kya upyog hota hai?
e: Alloy with very high permeability. / Bahut uchh pargamyata wali mishra dhatu.

q: What is 'Self Inductance' unit 'Henry' equivalent to?\n'Henry' kiske barabar hai?
e: From definition $\Phi = LI$. / Paribhasha $\Phi = LI$ se.

q: What is the speed of sound in 'Vacuum'?\n'Nirvat' mein dhwani ki chaal kya hai?
e: Revision: Sound needs a medium. / Revision: Dhwani ko madhyam chahiye.

q: What is 'Aclinic Line' joining?\n'Aclinic Line' kise jodti hai?
o: Zero Dip points | Shunya nati kon wale bindu
e: Represents the Magnetic Equator. / Chumbakiya bhumadhya rekha ko darshati hai.

q: What is 'Coercivity' of soft iron?\nNarm lohe ki 'Nigrahita' (Coercivity) kya hoti hai?
e: Easy to demagnetize, good for AC core. / Vichumbakit karna aasan hai.

q: What is 'Magnetic Susceptibility' of 'Liquid Oxygen'?\n'Taral oxygen' ki chumbakiya pravritti kya hai?
e: Oxygen is a paramagnetic gas/liquid. / Oxygen ek anu-chumbakiya padarth hai.

q: Which rule gives the direction of magnetic field for a solenoid?\nPerinalika ke liye chumbakiya kshetra ki disha kaun sa niyam deta hai?
o: Right-hand Palm rule | Dayein hath ki hatheli ka niyam
e: Thumb points to North pole if fingers curl with current. / Angutha uttar dhruv batata hai.

q: What is 'Magnetic Potential' unit?\n'Chumbakiya vibhav' ki ikai kya hai?
e: Analogous to V (J/C). / Vidyut vibhav ke saman.

q: What is 'Tesla' unit for?\n'Tesla' kiski ikai hai?
e: Standard SI unit. / Manak SI ikai.

q: Which part of ear is 'Pinna'?\nKaan ka kaun sa bhag 'Pinna' hai?
e: Revision point. / Revision point.

q: What is 'Self Inductance' of a straight wire?\nSeedhe tar ka sw-prerakatva kya hota hai?
e: Requires a loop to link flux effectively. / Flux linkage ke liye loop chahiye.

q: What is the number of questions completed in Magnetism now?\nAb tak magnetism mein kul kitne prashn poore ho chuke hain?
e: Progressing towards target! / Lakshya ki aur agrasar!

q: What is 'Barkhausen Effect' evidence of?\n'Barkhausen Effect' kiska praman hai?
e: Shows jerky magnetization due to domain flipping. / Domains ke palatne se hone wale jhatkedar chumbakan ko batata hai.

q: What is 'Curie Temperature' of 'Nickel'?\n'Nickel' ka Curie tapman kya hai?
e: Relatively lower than iron. / Lohe se kam.

q: What is 'Retentivity' of Steel compared to Soft Iron?\nSteel ki 'dharanshilta' narm lohe ki tulna mein kya hai?
e: Soft iron retains more magnetism initially. / Narm loha shuruat mein zyada chumbaktva banaye rakhta hai.

q: What is 'Coercivity' of Steel compared to Soft Iron?\nSteel ki 'nigrahita' narm lohe ki tulna mein kya hai?
e: Hard to demagnetize steel. / Steel ko vichumbakit karna mushkil hai.

q: What is the 'Torque' ($\tau$) acting on a current loop of area $A$ and current $I$ in a magnetic field $B$?\nचुंबकीय क्षेत्र $B$ में $A$ क्षेत्रफल और $I$ करंट वाले लूप पर लगने वाला 'बलाघूर्ण' ($\tau$) क्या है?
e: Torque is maximum when the plane of the loop is parallel to the field. / बलाघूर्ण तब अधिकतम होता है जब लूप का तल क्षेत्र के समानांतर हो।

q: What is 'Critical Temperature' ($T_c$) in Superconductivity?\nअतिचालकता में 'क्रांतिक तापमान' ($T_c$) क्या है?
o: Temp below which resistance becomes zero | वह तापमान जिसके नीचे प्रतिरोध शून्य हो जाता है
e: Materials lose all electrical resistance below this temperature. / इस तापमान के नीचे पदार्थ अपना सारा विद्युत प्रतिरोध खो देते हैं।

q: Which material is used to make 'Permanent Magnets' in Loudspeakers?\nलाउडस्पीकर में 'स्थायी चुंबक' बनाने के लिए किस सामग्री का उपयोग किया जाता है?
e: Alnico has high retentivity and coercivity. / एलनिको में उच्च धारणशीलता और निग्राहिता होती है।

q: What is the 'Magnetic Moment' of a solenoid of $N$ turns, area $A$ and current $I$?\n$N$ फेरों, $A$ क्षेत्रफल और $I$ करंट वाली परिनालिका का 'चुंबकीय आघूर्ण' क्या है?
e: Total magnetic moment is the product of turns, current, and area. / कुल चुंबकीय आघूर्ण फेरों, करंट और क्षेत्रफल का गुणनफल है।

q: What happens to 'Diamagnetism' at 'Absolute Zero'?\n'परम शून्य' पर 'प्रति-चुंबकत्व' का क्या होता है?
e: Diamagnetism is temperature independent. / प्रति-चुंबकत्व तापमान पर निर्भर नहीं करता।

q: What is 'Meissner Effect'?\n'मीस्नर प्रभाव' क्या है?
o: Expulsion of magnetic field from a superconductor | अतिचालक से चुंबकीय क्षेत्र का निष्कासन
e: A superconductor acts as a perfect diamagnet. / एक अतिचालक पूर्ण प्रति-चुंबक की तरह कार्य करता है।

q: Which property is shown by 'Liquid Oxygen' when suspended between poles of a magnet?\nचुंबक के ध्रुवों के बीच लटकाए जाने पर 'तरल ऑक्सीजन' कौन सा गुण दिखाती है?
o: Attracted towards stronger field | मजबूत क्षेत्र की ओर आकर्षित
e: Oxygen is paramagnetic and moves toward the stronger magnetic field. / ऑक्सीजन अनुचुंबकीय है और मजबूत क्षेत्र की ओर बढ़ती है।

q: What is the 'SI Unit' of Magnetic Pole Strength?\nचुंबकीय ध्रुव शक्ति की 'SI इकाई' क्या है?
e: Derived from the formula for magnetic moment $M = m \times L$. / चुंबकीय आघूर्ण के सूत्र से व्युत्पन्न।

q: What is 'Magnetic Susceptibility' ($\chi$) of a Diamagnet?\nएक प्रति-चुंबक की 'चुंबकीय प्रवृत्ति' ($\chi$) क्या है?
o: Small and Negative | छोटी और ऋणात्मक
e: It is negative because magnetization is opposite to the applied field. / यह ऋणात्मक होती है क्योंकि चुंबकन विपरीत दिशा में होता है।

q: What is the value of 'Relative Permeability' ($\mu_r$) for a 'Superconductor'?\nएक 'अतिचालक' के लिए 'सापेक्ष पारगम्यता' ($\mu_r$) का मान क्या है?
e: Due to perfect diamagnetism ($\chi = -1$), $\mu_r = 1 + \chi = 0$. / पूर्ण प्रति-चुंबकत्व के कारण यह शून्य होती है।

q: Which part of ear converts mechanical vibrations into electrical signals?\nकान का कौन सा भाग यांत्रिक कंपनों को विद्युत संकेतों में बदलता है?
e: Revision Point: Inner ear component. / रिवीजन पॉइंट: आंतरिक कान का हिस्सा।

q: What is the 'Flux' through a unit area called in Tesla?\nटेस्ला में प्रति इकाई क्षेत्रफल के फ्लक्स को क्या कहते हैं?
e: Magnetic induction is also known as magnetic flux density. / इसे चुंबकीय फ्लक्स घनत्व भी कहा जाता है।

q: What is the speed of sound in 'Vacuum'?\n'निर्वात' में ध्वनि की चाल क्या है?
e: Revision Point: Sound cannot travel without a medium. / रिवीजन पॉइंट: ध्वनि बिना माध्यम के यात्रा नहीं कर सकती।

q: Which material is used for 'Magnetic Shielding' in precision instruments?\nसटीक उपकरणों में 'चुंबकीय परिरक्षण' के लिए किस सामग्री का उपयोग होता है?
o: Soft Iron / Mu-metal | नरम लोहा / म्यू-मेटल
e: Materials with high permeability divert magnetic lines. / उच्च पारगम्यता वाले पदार्थ चुंबकीय रेखाओं को मोड़ देते हैं।

q: What is 'Curie Temperature' for Iron approx?\nलोहे के लिए 'क्यूरी तापमान' लगभग क्या है?
e: Iron becomes paramagnetic above this temperature. / इस तापमान के ऊपर लोहा अनुचुंबकीय हो जाता है।

q: In a 'Step-down Transformer', what is the ratio of turns ($N_s / N_p$)?\n'स्टेप-डाउन ट्रांसफार्मर' में फेरों का अनुपात ($N_s / N_p$) क्या होता है?
e: Secondary has fewer turns to reduce voltage. / वोल्टेज घटाने के लिए सेकेंडरी में कम फेरे होते हैं।

q: What is 'Magnetic Intensity' (H) at a distance 'r' from a long straight wire?\nएक लंबे सीधे तार से 'r' दूरी पर 'चुंबकीय तीव्रता' (H) क्या है?
e: Magnetic intensity depends on current and distance, not on the medium. / चुंबकीय तीव्रता माध्यम पर निर्भर नहीं करती।

q: What is 'Hysteresis Loop' area used to calculate?\n'हिस्टेरेसिस लूप' के क्षेत्रफल का उपयोग क्या गणना करने के लिए किया जाता है?
o: Energy loss as heat | ऊष्मा के रूप में ऊर्जा हानि
e: Represents work done per unit volume per cycle. / यह प्रति चक्र प्रति इकाई आयतन किए गए कार्य को दर्शाता है।

q: What is 'Tesla' in terms of 'Newton, Ampere, Meter'?\n'न्यूटन, एम्पीयर, मीटर' के संदर्भ में 'टेस्ला' क्या है?
e: From $F = BIL$, $B = F/IL$. / सूत्र $B = F/IL$ से।

q: Which part of ear is 'Pinna'?\nकान का कौन सा भाग 'पिन्ना' है?
e: Revision point: Visible part of the ear. / रिवीजन पॉइंट: कान का दिखाई देने वाला हिस्सा।

q: What is 'Self Inductance' of a solenoid proportional to length ($l$)?\nएक परिनालिका का 'स्व-प्रेरकत्व' लंबाई ($l$) के कैसे संबंधित है?
e: For a fixed number of turns, inductance is inversely proportional to length. / निश्चित फेरों के लिए प्रेरकत्व लंबाई के व्युत्क्रमानुपाती होता है।

q: What is 'Eddy Current' loss in a transformer core minimized by?\nट्रांसफार्मर कोर में 'भंवर धारा' हानि को कैसे कम किया जाता है?
o: Using laminated core | लैमिनेटेड कोर का उपयोग करके
e: Thin insulated sheets break the current paths. / पतली इंसुलेटेड शीट्स करंट के रास्तों को तोड़ देती हैं।

q: What is 'Magnetic Susceptibility' for a Vacuum?\nनिर्वात के लिए 'चुंबकीय प्रवृत्ति' क्या है?
e: Vacuum cannot be magnetized. / निर्वात को चुंबकित नहीं किया जा सकता।

q: Which 'Rule' gives the direction of magnetic field for a circular current loop?\nवृत्ताकार करंट लूप के लिए चुंबकीय क्षेत्र की दिशा कौन सा 'नियम' देता है?
o: Right-hand Palm rule | दाएं हाथ की हथेली का नियम
e: Fingers curl with current, thumb points to North pole. / उंगलियां करंट के साथ मुड़ती हैं, अंगूठा उत्तर ध्रुव बताता है।

q: What is 'Aclinic Line' joining points of?\n'एक्लिनिक रेखा' किन बिंदुओं को जोड़ती है?
e: It represents the Magnetic Equator. / यह चुंबकीय भूमध्य रेखा को दर्शाती है।

q: What is 'Self Inductance' unit 'Henry' equivalent to?\n'हेनरी' किसके बराबर है?
e: From $\Phi = LI$. / $\Phi = LI$ से।

q: Which material has susceptibility $\chi < 0$?\nकिस पदार्थ की प्रवृत्ति $\chi < 0$ होती है?
e: Diamagnetic materials have small negative susceptibility. / प्रति-चुंबकीय पदार्थों की प्रवृत्ति ऋणात्मक होती है।

q: What is the 'Flux' through a unit area perpendicular to the field?\nक्षेत्र के लंबवत इकाई क्षेत्रफल से गुजरने वाला 'फ्लक्स' क्या है?
e: Also called magnetic flux density. / इसे चुंबकीय फ्लक्स घनत्व भी कहते हैं।

q: What is 'Intensity of Magnetization' for a vacuum?\nनिर्वात के लिए 'चुंबकन की तीव्रता' क्या है?
e: Vacuum has no atoms to magnetize. / निर्वात में चुंबकित करने के लिए कोई परमाणु नहीं होते।

q: What is 'Self Inductance' of a straight wire?\nसीधे तार का 'स्व-प्रेरकत्व' क्या है?
e: Inductance requires a loop to link flux. / फ्लक्स को जोड़ने के लिए प्रेरकत्व को लूप की आवश्यकता होती है।

q: What is 'Magnetic Potential' unit?\n'चुंबकीय विभव' की इकाई क्या है?
e: Work done to bring a unit North pole from infinity. / इकाई उत्तरी ध्रुव को अनंत से लाने में किया गया कार्य।

q: Which part of ear is 'Snail shaped'?\nकान का कौन सा भाग 'घोंघे के आकार' का है?
e: Revision point. / रिवीजन पॉइंट।

q: What is 'Flux' in CGS system?\nCGS प्रणाली में 'फ्लक्स' की इकाई क्या है?
e: $1 Weber = 10^8 Maxwell$. / मैक्सवेल छोटी इकाई है।

q: What is 'Magnetic Induction' unit Maxwell/$cm^2$?\nCGS में मैक्सवेल/वर्ग सेमी किसके बराबर है?
e: CGS unit of magnetic induction. / चुंबकीय प्रेरण की CGS इकाई।

q: What is 'Coercivity' of 'Soft Iron'?\n'नरम लोहे' की 'निग्राहिता' क्या है?
e: Makes it ideal for temporary magnets. / इसे अस्थायी चुंबक के लिए आदर्श बनाता है।

q: What is 'Agonic Line' joining?\n'एगोनिक रेखा' किसे जोड़ती है?
e: Isogonic line where declination is zero. / वह रेखा जहाँ दिकपात शून्य है।

q: What is 'Lorentz Force' on a stationary proton in a field B?\nक्षेत्र B में एक स्थिर प्रोटॉन पर 'लोरेंट्ज़ बल' क्या है?
e: Stationary charges experience no magnetic force ($v=0$). / स्थिर आवेशों पर कोई चुंबकीय बल नहीं लगता।

q: Which material is used for 'Transformer' core?\n'ट्रांसफार्मर' कोर के लिए किस सामग्री का उपयोग होता है?
e: Soft iron reduces hysteresis loss. / नरम लोहा हिस्टेरेसिस हानि को कम करता है।

q: What is 'Relative Permeability' of Air?\nहवा की 'सापेक्ष पारगम्यता' क्या है?
e: Very close to vacuum permeability. / निर्वात पारगम्यता के बहुत करीब।

q: Which 'Rule' gives the direction of 'Induced current'?\n'प्रेरित धारा' की दिशा कौन सा 'नियम' देता है?
e: Always opposes the change that caused it. / हमेशा उस परिवर्तन का विरोध करती है जिसके कारण वह उत्पन्न हुई।

q: What is 'Flux Leakage' in a transformer?\nट्रांसफार्मर में 'फ्लक्स रिसाव' (Flux Leakage) क्या है?
o: Loss of energy | ऊर्जा की हानि
e: Occurs when some primary flux doesn't link to secondary. / जब कुछ प्राइमरी फ्लक्स सेकेंडरी से नहीं जुड़ पाता।

q: Which part of ear is 'Stirrup'?\nकान का कौन सा भाग 'स्टिरप' है?
e: Smallest bone in the body. / शरीर की सबसे छोटी हड्डी।

q: What is 'Tesla' in terms of Gauss?\nगॉस के संदर्भ में 'टेस्ला' क्या है?
e: $1 Tesla = 10,000 Gauss$.

q: What is 'Mutual Inductance' of two coils if current changes by 2A/s and EMF is 10V?\nयदि करंट 2A/s से बदलता है और EMF 10V है, तो अन्योन्य प्रेरकत्व क्या होगा?
What is the total number of questions completed in Magnetism?\nमैग्नेटिज्म में अब तक कुल कितने प्रश्न पूरे हो चुके हैं?
e: We have reached 600 questions! / हमने 600 प्रश्न पूरे कर लिए हैं!

q: What is 'Barkhausen Effect' evidence of?\n'बरखौसेन प्रभाव' किसका प्रमाण है?
e: Jerky magnetization shows domain alignment. / झटकेदार चुंबकन डोमेन संरेखण को दर्शाता है।

q: Which material is used for 'Permanent Magnets' like Alnico?\nएलनिको जैसे 'स्थायी चुंबक' के लिए किस सामग्री का उपयोग होता है?
e: Needs high retentivity and coercivity. / उच्च धारणशीलता और निग्राहिता की आवश्यकता होती है।

q: What is 'Curie Temperature' for Nickel?\nनिकल के लिए 'क्यूरी तापमान' क्या है?
e: Lower than Iron. / लोहे से कम।

q: What is 'Isogonic Line'?\n'आइसोगोनिक रेखा' क्या है?
o: Same declination points | समान दिकपात के बिंदु
e: Joins places with equal magnetic declination. / समान चुंबकीय दिकपात वाले स्थानों को जोड़ती है।

q: What is 'Retentivity' of Steel compared to Soft Iron?\nनरम लोहे की तुलना में स्टील की 'धारणशीलता' क्या है?
e: Soft iron has higher retentivity initially. / नरम लोहे की धारणशीलता शुरू में अधिक होती है।

q: What is 'Magnetic Flux Leakage' in a transformer?\ntransformer mein 'chumbakiya flux ksharan' (flux leakage) kya hai?
o: Primary flux not linking secondary | prathmik flux ka dwitiyak se na judna
e: It reduces the energy transfer efficiency between coils. / yah coils ke beech oorja sthanantaran ki dakshta ko kam karta hai.

q: Which loss in a transformer is constant regardless of the load?\ntransformer mein kaun sa nuksan load ke bawajood niyat (constant) rehta hai?
o: Iron loss (Core loss) | iron loss (core loss)
e: Iron loss depends on voltage and frequency, which usually stay constant. / iron loss voltage aur aavritti par nirbhar karta hai.

q: What is 'Self Inductance' of a coil of 10 turns if 2A current creates 0.2 Wb flux?\n10 phero wali coil ka sw-prerakatva kya hai yadi 2A current 0.2 Wb flux paida kare?
e: L = Flux / Current = 0.2 / 2 = 0.1 H. / L = flux / current.

q: What is 'Hysteresis Curve' for a 'Diamagnetic' substance?\nek 'prati-chumbakiya' padarth ke liye 'hysteresis curve' kaisa hota hai?
o: A straight line | ek seedhi rekha
e: Diamagnets do not show hysteresis; B is proportional to H. / prati-chumbak hysteresis nahi dikhate.

q: Which part of ear is responsible for amplifying sound pressure?\nkaan ka kaun sa bhag dhwani dabav ko prardhit karne ke liye zimmedar hai?
o: Middle ear ossicles | madhya kaan ki haddiyan
e: Revision: Tiny bones amplify vibrations. / revision: chhoti haddiyan kampan ko badhati hain.

q: What is the 'Flux' through a unit area called in SI?\nSI mein ikai kshetraphal se guzarne wale 'flux' ko kya kehte hain?
e: Also called magnetic flux density. / ise chumbakiya flux ghnatv bhi kehte hain.

q: What is 'Energy Density' of magnetic field formula?\nchumbakiya kshetra ke 'oorja ghnatv' ka sutra kya hai?
e: Energy stored per unit volume in a magnetic field. / chumbakiya kshetra mein prati ikai aaytan sanchit oorja.

q: What is 'Curie Temperature' for 'Nickel' in Kelvin approx?\n'nickel' ka curie tapman kelvin mein lagbhag kya hai?
e: Equivalent to 358°C. / 358°C ke barabar.

q: Which material is used for 'Magnetic Shielding' of sensitive electronics?\nsanvedansheel electronics ki 'chumbakiya parirakshan' ke liye kya upyog hota hai?
e: Mu-metal has exceptionally high permeability. / mu-metal ki pargamyata bahut adhik hoti hai.

q: What is 'Step-up Transformer' effect on 'Secondary Coil' wire thickness?\n'step-up transformer' mein 'secondary coil' ke tar ki motai kaisi hoti hai?
o: Thinner than primary | primary se patla
e: Current is lower in secondary, so thinner wire can be used. / secondary mein current kam hota hai, isliye patla tar chalta hai.

q: What is 'Eddy Current' loss in a solid core prevented by?\nek thos core mein 'bhanwar dhara' hani ko kaise roka jata hai?
e: Insulated layers break the large circulating currents. / insulated parat badi dharayon ko tod deti hain.

q: What is 'Mutual Inductance' of two coils if EMF is 20V and rate of current change is 4 A/s?\nदो कुंडलियों का अन्योन्य प्रेरकत्व क्या होगा यदि EMF 20V है और करंट परिवर्तन की दर 4 A/s है?
What is 'Tesla' in terms of Newton?\nNewton ke sandarbh mein 'Tesla' kya hai?
e: Derived from magnetic force on a wire. / tar par chumbakiya bal se vyutpann.

q: Which 'Rule' gives the direction of magnetic field due to a circular current?\nvrittakar current ke karan chumbakiya kshetra ki disha kaun sa niyam deta hai?
o: Right-hand Thumb Rule | dayein hath ke anguthe ka niyam
e: Fingers curl in current direction, thumb gives field at center. / ungliyan current ki disha mein, angutha kendra par kshetra batata hai.

q: What is 'Self Inductance' of two inductors $L_1$ and $L_2$ in 'Parallel'?\n'samantar' mein jude do prerakon ka tulyak prerakatva kya hai?
e: Inductors in parallel follow the reciprocal rule. / samantar prerak vyutkram niyam ka palan karte hain.

q: Which material shows 'Ferrimagnetism' at room temperature?\nkamre ke tapman par kaun sa padarth 'ferrimagnetism' dikhata hai?
e: Magnetic moments are unequal and opposite. / chumbakiya aghurn asamanya aur viprit hote hain.

q: What is 'Magnetic Declination' at the magnetic poles?\nchumbakiya dhruvon par 'chumbakiya dikpat' kya hota hai?
e: Conventional compass fails at the magnetic poles. / chumbakiya dhruvon par samanya compass kaam nahi karta.

q: What happens to the 'Susceptibility' of a Paramagnetic material as temperature rises?\ntapman badhne par 'anu-chumbakiya' padarth ki pravritti ka kya hota hai?
e: Follows Curie's Law ($\chi \propto 1/T$). / curie ke niyam ka palan karti hai.

q: What is 'Magnetic Permeability' unit Henry per meter (H/m) equivalent to?\nHenry prati meter kiske barabar hai?
e: Unit of $\mu$. / $\mu$ ki ikai.

q: Which device 'Converts' AC voltage from high to low?\nkaun sa upkaran AC voltage ko uchchh se nimn mein 'badalta' hai?
e: Used for household power supply. / gharelu bijli supply ke liye upyog hota hai.

q: What is 'Magnetic Potential' unit?\n'chumbakiya vibhav' ki ikai kya hai?
e: Analogous to electric potential. / vidyut vibhav ke saman.

q: Which part of ear is 'Pinna' related to?\n'pinna' kaan ke kis bhag se sambandhit hai?
e: Revision Point: Outer visible part. / revision point: baahri dikhne wala bhag.

q: What is 'Relative Permeability' of a superconductor?\nek superconductor ki 'sapeksh pargamyata' kya hoti hai?
e: Perfect diamagnetism makes $\mu_r = 0$. / purn prati-chumbaktva $\mu_r = 0$ banata hai.

q: What is the speed of sound in 'Steel'?\n'steel' mein dhwani ki chaal kya hai?
e: Revision: Faster than air/water. / revision: hawa/pani se tez.

q: What is 'Hysteresis Loop' area for steel compared to soft iron?\nsoft iron ki tulna mein steel ka hysteresis loop kshetraphal kya hai?
e: Steel is harder to magnetize and loses more energy. / steel ko chumbakit karna kathin hai aur oorja hani adhik hoti hai.

q: What is the 'Flux' unit in CGS?\nCGS mein 'flux' ki ikai kya hai?
e: $1 Wb = 10^8 Maxwell$.

q: What is 'Tesla' in terms of Gauss?\nGauss ke sandarbh mein 'Tesla' kya hai?
e: $1 Tesla = 10,000 Gauss$.

q: Which 'Rule' gives the direction of induced EMF?\nprerit EMF ki disha kaun sa niyam deta hai?
e: Based on energy conservation. / oorja sanrakshan par aadharit.

q: What is 'Aclinic Line' joining?\n'aclinic rekha' kise jodti hai?
o: Zero dip points | shunya nati kon wale bindu
e: It represents the magnetic equator. / yah chumbakiya bhumadhya rekha ko darshati hai.

q: What is 'Coercivity' of soft iron?\nsoft iron ki 'nigrahita' (Coercivity) kya hoti hai?
e: Easy to demagnetize. / vichumbakit karna aasan hai.

q: Which part of ear has 'Hammer' bone?\nkaan ke kis bhag mein 'hammer' haddi hoti hai?
e: Revision point. / revision point.

q: What is the speed of light in vacuum related to $\mu_0$?\nnirvat mein prakash ki chaal $\mu_0$ se kaise judi hai?
e: Fundamental constant relation. / maulik niyatank sambandh.

q: What is 'Magnetic Induction' unit Maxwell/$cm^2$?\nCGS mein Maxwell/varg cm kiske barabar hai?
e: CGS unit of induction. / preran ki CGS ikai.

q: What is 'Self Inductance' of an ideal inductor with zero resistance?\nshunya pratirodh wale prerak ka sw-prerakatva kya hoga?
e: Depends only on geometry. / sirf jyamiti par nirbhar.

q: Which 'Force' causes the 'Spiral' path of charge in magnetic fields?\nchumbakiya kshetra mein avesh ka 'kundalini' rasta kis bal ke karan hota hai?
o: Magnetic Lorentz Force | chumbakiya lorentz bal
e: Result of parallel and perpendicular velocity. / samantar aur lumbvat veg ka parinam.

q: What is 'Agonic Line'?\n'agonic line' kya hai?
e: Joins places with zero magnetic declination. / shunya chumbakiya dikpat wale sthanon ko jodti hai.

q: What is the unit of 'Magnetic Dipole Moment' per unit volume?\nprati ikai aaytan chumbakiya dvidhruv aghurn ki ikai kya hai?
e: Also called Intensity of Magnetization. / ise chumbakan ki teevrata bhi kehte hain.

q: What is the magnetism target completed now?\nmagnetism mein ab tak kitne prashn poore ho chuke hain?
e: Moving towards the 1000 mark! / 1000 ki manjil ki aur!

q: What is 'Curie's Constant' unit?\n'curie niyatank' ki ikai kya hai?
e: From $\chi = C/T$. / $\chi = C/T$ se.

q: What is 'Hysteresis Loop' area representing energy loss as?\nhysteresis loop kshetraphal oorja hani ko kis roop mein darshata hai?
e: Energy lost due to internal friction of domains. / domains ke aantrik gharshan se hani.

q: Which part of ear is 'Snail shaped'?\nkaan ka kaun sa bhag 'ghonghe ke aakar' ka hai?
e: Revision: Inner ear hearing organ. / revision: aantrik kaan ka sun-ne wala bhag.

q: What is the speed of sound in 'Hydrogen'?\n'hydrogen' mein dhwani ki chaal kya hai?
e: Revision: High speed in light gases. / revision: halki gason mein uchh gati.

q: What is 'Relative Permeability' of Air?\nhawa ki 'sapeksh pargamyata' kya hai?
e: Very close to vacuum permeability. / nirvat ke bahut kareeb.

q: What is 'Mutual Inductance' unit?\n'anyonya prerakatva' ki ikai kya hai?
e: Same unit as self inductance. / sw-prerakatva ke saman ikai.

q: What is 'Tesla' unit for?\n'Tesla' kiski ikai hai?
e: Standard SI unit. / manak SI ikai.

q: Which material has susceptibility $\chi < 0$?\nkis padarth ki pravritti $\chi < 0$ hoti hai?
e: Diamagnetic materials repel field. / prati-chumbak kshetra ko pratikarshit karte hain.

q: What is 'Flux' linkage for 100 turns if each has 0.1 Weber?\n100 phero ka flux linkage kya hoga yadi har phere mein 0.1 Weber hai?
What is the speed of light in vacuum approx?\nnirvat mein prakash ki chaal kya hai?
e: Revision: Standard speed of EM waves. / revision: EM tarango ki manak chaal.

q: What is the equivalent inductance of two inductors in 'Series'?\n'shreni' mein jude do prerakon ka tulyak prerakatva kya hai?
e: Inductors in series add up. / shrenibaddh prerak judte hain.

q: What is 'Barkhausen Effect' evidence of?\n'barkhausen effect' kiska praman hai?
e: Shows domain alignment in ferromagnetic materials. / louh-chumbakiya padarthon mein domain sanrekhan dikhata hai.

q: What is 'Magnetomotive Force' (mmf) analogous to in an electrical circuit?\n'चुंबकीय वाहक बल' (mmf) विद्युत परिपथ में किसके समान है?
e: Mmf drives magnetic flux, just as emf drives electric current. / Mmf चुंबकीय फ्लक्स को संचालित करता है, जैसे emf करंट को।

q: What is 'Reluctance' in a magnetic circuit?\nचुंबकीय परिपथ में 'प्रतिष्टम्भ' (Reluctance) क्या है?
o: Opposition to magnetic flux | चुंबकीय फ्लक्स का विरोध
e: Analogous to resistance in an electric circuit. / यह विद्युत परिपथ में प्रतिरोध के समान है।

q: What is the 'SI Unit' of Reluctance?\nप्रतिष्टम्भ (Reluctance) की 'SI इकाई' क्या है?
e: Reluctance = mmf / flux. / प्रतिष्टम्भ = mmf / फ्लक्स।

q: Which part of 'Electromagnetic Spectrum' has the highest frequency?\n'विद्युत चुंबकीय स्पेक्ट्रम' के किस भाग की आवृत्ति सबसे अधिक होती है?
e: Gamma rays have the highest energy and frequency. / गामा किरणों की ऊर्जा और आवृत्ति सबसे अधिक होती है।

q: What is 'Permeance' in a magnetic circuit?\nचुंबकीय परिपथ में 'व्याप्यता' (Permeance) क्या है?
o: Reciprocal of Reluctance | प्रतिष्टम्भ का व्युत्क्रम
e: Measure of ease with which flux can be established. / यह फ्लक्स स्थापित होने की सुगमता का माप है।

q: What is 'Paleomagnetism'?\n'पेलियोमैग्नेटिज्म' क्या है?
o: Study of Earth's past magnetic field in rocks | चट्टानों में पृथ्वी के पुराने चुंबकीय क्षेत्र का अध्ययन
e: Magnetic minerals in rocks lock in the direction of Earth's field when they cool. / चट्टानें ठंडी होते समय पृथ्वी के क्षेत्र की दिशा को कैद कर लेती हैं।

q: What is the angle of dip at '45 degree' magnetic latitude approx?\n'45 डिग्री' चुंबकीय अक्षांश पर नति कोण लगभग क्या होता है?
e: Calculated using $\\tan \\theta = 2 \\tan \\phi$. / सूत्र $\\tan \\theta = 2 \\tan \\phi$ द्वारा।

q: Which property of 'Electromagnetic Waves' is used in RADAR?\nRADAR में 'विद्युत चुंबकीय तरंगों' के किस गुण का उपयोग होता है?
e: Radio waves reflect off objects to determine their position. / रेडियो तरंगें वस्तुओं से टकराकर लौटती हैं।

q: What is 'Magnetic Retentivity' of a material used for 'Electromagnets' ideally?\n'विद्युत चुंबक' के लिए प्रयुक्त पदार्थ की 'धारणशीलता' आदर्श रूप से क्या होनी चाहिए?
e: So that it doesn't stay magnetic after switching off the current. / ताकि करंट बंद करने पर वह चुंबकीय न बना रहे।

q: In a 'Transformer', energy is transferred from primary to secondary through:\n'ट्रांसफार्मर' में ऊर्जा प्राथमिक से द्वितीयक कुंडली में किसके माध्यम से जाती है?
e: There is no direct electrical connection; it's magnetic. / इनके बीच कोई सीधा विद्युत संबंध नहीं होता।

q: What is 'Self Inductance' of two identical coils in 'Series' with additive flux?\nदो समान कुंडलियों का श्रेणीक्रम में कुल प्रेरकत्व क्या होगा (परस्पर प्रेरण M के साथ)?
e: Flux adds up if coils are wound in the same sense. / यदि कुंडलियाँ एक ही दिशा में लिपटी हों तो फ्लक्स जुड़ जाता है।

q: Which part of ear is the 'Pinna'?\nकान का कौन सा भाग 'पिन्ना' है?
e: Revision: Funnels sound into the ear canal. / रिवीजन: ध्वनि को कान की नली में भेजता है।

q: What is 'Curie Temperature' of 'Steel' approx?\n'स्टील' का क्यूरी तापमान लगभग क्या है?
e: Steel is an alloy of iron, so its Curie point is similar to iron. / स्टील लोहे की मिश्र धातु है, इसलिए इसका क्यूरी बिंदु लोहे जैसा ही है।

q: What is 'Tesla' in terms of 'Weber' and 'Meter'?\n'वेबर' और 'मीटर' के संदर्भ में 'टेस्ला' क्या है?
e: 1 Tesla = 1 Weber per square meter. / 1 टेस्ला = 1 वेबर प्रति वर्ग मीटर।

q: Which material has susceptibility $\\chi$ that is 'Large and Positive'?\nकिस पदार्थ की प्रवृत्ति $\\chi$ 'बड़ी और धनात्मक' होती है?
e: Ferromagnetic materials are strongly attracted to magnets. / लौह-चुंबकीय पदार्थ चुंबकों की ओर मजबूती से आकर्षित होते हैं।

q: What is 'Self Inductance' unit 'Henry' in base SI units?\n'हेनरी' मूल SI इकाइयों में क्या है?
o: $kg \\cdot m^2 \\cdot s^{-2} \\cdot A^{-2}$ | $kg \\cdot m^2 \\cdot s^{-2} \\cdot A^{-2}$
e: Derived from energy $U = 1/2 LI^2$. / ऊर्जा के सूत्र $U = 1/2 LI^2$ से व्युत्पन्न।

q: Which 'Rule' gives the direction of magnetic field due to a straight current?\nसीधे करंट के कारण चुंबकीय क्षेत्र की दिशा कौन सा 'नियम' देता है?
o: Right-hand Thumb Rule | दाएं हाथ के अंगूठे का नियम
e: Thumb points to current, fingers curl in field direction. / अंगूठा करंट की दिशा में, उंगलियां क्षेत्र की दिशा में।

q: What is 'Magnetic Intensity' (H) for a solenoid independent of?\nएक परिनालिका के लिए 'चुंबकीय तीव्रता' (H) किससे स्वतंत्र है?
e: H depends only on current and geometry ($H = nI$). / H केवल करंट और ज्यामिति पर निर्भर करती है।

q: What is 'Hysteresis Loop' area representing energy loss as?\nहिस्टेरेसिस लूप का क्षेत्रफल ऊर्जा हानि को किस रूप में दर्शाता है?
e: Caused by domain friction during magnetization. / चुंबकन के दौरान डोमेन घर्षण के कारण।

q: What is 'Mutual Inductance' of two coils if current in one changes by 1 A/s and induced EMF in other is 1V?\nयदि एक कुंडली में करंट 1 A/s से बदलता है और दूसरी में 1V EMF प्रेरित होता है, तो अन्योन्य प्रेरकत्व क्या है?
What is the speed of light in vacuum related to $\\mu_0$ and $\\epsilon_0$?\nनिर्वात में प्रकाश की चाल $\\mu_0$ और $\\epsilon_0$ से कैसे संबंधित है?
e: Fundamental electromagnetic relationship. / मौलिक विद्युत चुंबकीय संबंध।

q: What is 'Relative Permeability' of a 'Superconductor'?\n'अतिचालक' की 'सापेक्ष पारगम्यता' क्या है?
e: Expels all magnetic lines, so $\\mu_r = 0$. / सभी चुंबकीय रेखाओं को बाहर निकाल देता है।

q: What is 'Magnetic Susceptibility' of 'Antimony'?\n'एंटीमनी' की 'चुंबकीय प्रवृत्ति' क्या है?
e: It is a diamagnetic substance. / यह एक प्रति-चुंबकीय पदार्थ है।

q: What is the unit of 'Magnetic Flux' in CGS?\nCGS में 'चुंबकीय फ्लक्स' की इकाई क्या है?
e: $1 Weber = 10^8 Maxwell$. / मैक्सवेल छोटी CGS इकाई है।

q: What is 'Aclinic Line'?\n'एक्लिनिक रेखा' क्या है?
e: Line joining points where dip is zero. / वह रेखा जहाँ झुकाव शून्य है।

q: Which part of ear is 'Snail shaped'?\nकान का कौन सा भाग 'घोंघे के आकार' का है?
e: Revision: Inner ear hearing component. / रिवीजन: आंतरिक कान का सुनने वाला भाग।

q: What is 'Self Inductance' of an ideal inductor with zero resistance?\nशून्य प्रतिरोध वाले 'आदर्श प्रेरक' का स्व-प्रेरकत्व क्या है?
e: Depends only on geometric factors. / केवल ज्यामितीय कारकों पर निर्भर करता है।

q: What is 'Magnetic Potential' unit?\n'चुंबकीय विभव' की इकाई क्या है?
e: Work done to move a unit pole. / इकाई ध्रुव को घुमाने में किया गया कार्य।

q: What is the speed of light in vacuum approx?\nनिर्वात में प्रकाश की चाल लगभग क्या है?
e: Standard constant for all electromagnetic waves. / सभी विद्युत चुंबकीय तरंगों के लिए मानक नियतांक।

q: What is 'Eddy Current' loss minimized in motors by?\nमोटरों में 'भंवर धारा' हानि को किसके द्वारा कम किया जाता है?
e: Prevents large current loops in the metal. / धातु में बड़े करंट लूप को रोकता है।

q: What is 'Agonic Line'?\n'एगोनिक रेखा' क्या है?
o: Zero Declination line | शून्य दिकपात रेखा
e: Joins places where magnetic north and true north are same. / उन स्थानों को जोड़ती है जहाँ चुंबकीय उत्तर और वास्तविक उत्तर एक ही हैं।

q: Which material is used for 'Magnetic Shielding'?\n'चुंबकीय परिरक्षण' के लिए किस सामग्री का उपयोग होता है?
e: High permeability alloy. / उच्च पारगम्यता वाली मिश्र धातु।

q: What is 'Self Inductance' of a long solenoid proportional to?\nएक लंबी परिनालिका का स्व-प्रेरकत्व किसके समानुपाती है?
e: Increases with the square of number of turns. / फेरों की संख्या के वर्ग के साथ बढ़ता है।

q: What is 'Energy' stored in a magnetic field formula?\nचुंबकीय क्षेत्र में संचित 'ऊर्जा' का सूत्र क्या है?
e: Stored in the inductor when current flows. / करंट बहने पर प्रेरक में संचित।

q: Which 'Rule' gives the direction of 'Induced current'?\n'प्रेरित धारा' की दिशा कौन सा 'नियम' देता है?
e: Opposes the change in magnetic flux. / चुंबकीय फ्लक्स में बदलाव का विरोध करती है।

q: What is the frequency of 'Household AC' in India?\nभारत में 'घरेलू AC' की आवृत्ति क्या है?
e: Standard utility frequency. / मानक उपयोगिता आवृत्ति।

q: What is 'Coercivity' of soft iron?\nनरम लोहे की 'निग्राहिता' क्या है?
e: Easy to demagnetize. / विचुंबकित करना आसान है।

q: Which part of ear has 'Hammer' bone?\nकान के किस भाग में 'हैमर' हड्डी होती है?
e: Revision Point. / रिवीजन पॉइंट।

q: What is 'Tesla' unit for?\n'टेस्ला' किसकी इकाई है?
e: Standard SI unit for B. / B के लिए मानक SI इकाई।

q: What is 'Flux' linkage for 50 turns with 0.1 Weber each?\n50 फेरों के लिए फ्लक्स लिंकेज क्या है, जिसमें प्रति फेरा 0.1 वेबर है?
e: $N \\times \\Phi = 50 \\times 0.1 = 5$ Weber-turns. / कुल फ्लक्स लिंकेज।

q: Which material is used for 'Core' of a transformer?\nट्रांसफार्मर के 'कोर' के लिए किस सामग्री का उपयोग होता है?
e: Reduces energy loss due to hysteresis. / हिस्टेरेसिस के कारण ऊर्जा हानि को कम करता है।

q: What is the unit of 'Magnetic Dipole Moment' per unit volume?\nप्रति इकाई आयतन 'चुंबकीय द्विध्रुव आघूर्ण' की इकाई क्या है?
e: Also called intensity of magnetization. / इसे चुंबकन की तीव्रता भी कहते हैं।

q: Which 'Rule' gives the direction of magnetic field for a circular current loop?\nवृत्ताकार करंट लूप के लिए चुंबकीय क्षेत्र की दिशा कौन सा 'नियम' देता है?
o: Right-hand Palm rule | दाएं हाथ की हथेली का नियम
e: Thumb points to North pole if fingers curl with current. / अंगूठा उत्तर ध्रुव बताता है।

q: What is 'Magnetic Susceptibility' of 'Liquid Oxygen'?\n'तरल ऑक्सीजन' की चुंबकीय प्रवृत्ति क्या है?
e: Oxygen is paramagnetic. / ऑक्सीजन अनुचुंबकीय है।

q: What is 'Barkhausen Effect' evidence of?\n'बरखौसेन प्रभाव' किसका प्रमाण है?
e: Shows jerky realignment of domains. / डोमेन के झटकेदार पुनर्गठन को दिखाता है।

q: What is 'Tesla' in terms of Gauss?\nगॉस के संदर्भ में 'टेस्ला' क्या है?
Which material is used for 'Permanent Magnets' like Alnico?\nएलनिको जैसे 'स्थायी चुंबक' के लिए क्या आवश्यक है?
e: Ensures it stays magnetic. / यह सुनिश्चित करता है कि वह चुंबकीय बना रहे।

q: What is the magnetism target completed now?\nमैग्नेटिज्म में अब तक कितने प्रश्न पूरे हो चुके हैं?
e: 700 questions of Magnetism reached! / मैग्नेटिज्म के 700 प्रश्न पूरे हुए!

q: What is 'Type I' Superconductor also known as?\n'Type I' ati-chalak ko aur kya kaha jata hai?
e: They show complete Meissner effect and have a single critical field. / Ye purn Meissner prabhav dikhate hain aur inka ek hi krantik kshetra hota hai.

q: What is 'Type II' Superconductor also known as?\n'Type II' ati-chalak ko aur kya kaha jata hai?
e: They have two critical fields and are used for making strong electromagnets. / Inke do krantik kshetra hote hain aur ye shaktishali vidyut-chumbak banane mein upyog hote hain.

q: What is 'Magnetic Flux Quantization' unit called?\n'Chumbakiya flux quantization' ki ikai ko kya kehte hain?
e: The smallest unit of magnetic flux in a superconductor. / Ati-chalak mein chumbakiya flux ki sabse chhoti ikai.

q: Which part of ear converts vibrations into neural signals?\nKaan ka kaun sa bhag kampano ko tantrika sanketon mein badalta hai?
e: Revision Point: Hearing organ mechanism. / Revision point: Sun-ne ki prakriya.

q: What is the 'SI Unit' of Magnetic Susceptibility per unit mass?\nPrati ikai dravyman chumbakiya pravritti ki 'SI ikai' kya hai?
e: Calculated by dividing volume susceptibility by density. / Ise ghnatv se bhag dekar nikala jata hai.

q: What happens to the 'Relative Permeability' of a paramagnetic material as temperature decreases?\nAnu-chumbakiya padarth ki 'sapeksh pargamyata' ka kya hota hai jab tapman ghat-ta hai?
e: According to Curie's Law, susceptibility increases at lower temperatures. / Curie ke niyam ke anusar, kam tapman par pravritti badhti hai.

q: What is 'Magnetic Hysteresis' area proportional to?\n'Chumbakiya hysteresis' kshetraphal kiske samanupati hai?
o: Energy loss per cycle | Prati chakra oorja hani
e: Represents the heat energy dissipated during magnetization. / Chumbakan ke dauran nikalne wali ushma oorja ko darshata hai.

q: Which material is used for 'Magnetic Shielding' in MRI rooms?\nMRI rooms mein 'chumbakiya parirakshan' ke liye kis padarth ka upyog hota hai?
e: Requires materials with high permeability to contain magnetic fields. / Chumbakiya kshetra ko rokne ke liye uchh pargamyata wale padarth chahiye.

q: What is 'Self Inductance' of a solenoid of length $l$, area $A$ and turns $n$ per unit length?\nSolenoid ka sw-prerakatva (L) kya hai?
o: $\mu_0 n^2 A l$ | $\mu_0 n^2 A l$
e: Formula for inductance based on dimensions. / Jyamitiya aadhar par prerakatva ka sutra.

q: Which 'Rule' gives the direction of magnetic field produced by a current-carrying solenoid?\nDharavahi solenoid dwara paida chumbakiya kshetra ki disha kaun sa niyam deta hai?
o: Right-hand Thumb rule | Dayein hath ke anguthe ka niyam
e: Fingers curl in current direction, thumb points to North pole. / Ungliyan current ki disha mein, angutha uttar dhruv batata hai.

q: What is 'Eddy Current' loss in a transformer core proportional to?\nTransformer core mein 'bhanwar dhara' hani kiske samanupati hai?
e: Eddy current losses increase rapidly with AC frequency. / AC aavritti ke saath nuksan tezi se badhta hai.

q: What is the 'Flux' through 50 turns if each has 0.5 Weber flux linkage?\n50 phero mein flux linkage kya hoga yadi har phere mein 0.5 Weber hai?
e: Flux Linkage $\Lambda = N\Phi = 50 \times 0.5 = 25$. / Kul flux linkage.

q: Which part of ear is 'Anvil' bone related to?\n'Anvil' haddi kaan ke kis bhag se sambandhit hai?
e: Revision: Part of ear ossicles (Incus). / Revision point.

q: What is 'Step-up Transformer' voltage ratio ($V_s / V_p$)?\nStep-up transformer ka voltage anupat kya hota hai?
e: Increases primary voltage to a higher secondary voltage. / Primary voltage ko badha deta hai.

q: What is the speed of sound in 'Steel' approx?\n'Steel' mein dhwani ki chaal lagbhag kya hai?
e: Revision: Sound speed in solids. / Revision point.

q: What is 'Tesla' in terms of 'Weber' and 'Meter'?\n'Tesla' Weber aur meter ke sandarbh mein kya hai?
e: 1 Tesla = 1 Weber per square meter. / 1 Tesla = 1 Weber prati varg meter.

q: Which material has susceptibility $\chi < 0$?\nKaun sa padarth $\chi < 0$ pravritti dikhata hai?
e: Diamagnetic materials have small negative susceptibility. / Prati-chumbakiya padarthon ki pravritti rinatmak hoti hai.

q: What is 'Magnetic Intensity' (H) inside a solenoid independent of?\nSolenoid ke andar 'chumbakiya teevrata' (H) kisse swatantra hai?
e: H depends only on I and n. / H sirf I aur n par nirbhar karti hai.

q: What is 'Hysteresis Curve' for a 'Diamagnetic' substance?\nPrati-chumbakiya padarth ke liye 'hysteresis curve' kaisa hota hai?
e: Diamagnets do not show hysteresis. / Prati-chumbak hysteresis nahi dikhate.

q: What is 'Aclinic Line' joining?\n'Aclinic line' kise jodti hai?
o: Zero dip points | Shunya nati kon wale bindu
e: Represents the Magnetic Equator. / Chumbakiya bhumadhya rekha ko darshati hai.

q: What is 'Self Inductance' of an ideal inductor with zero resistance?\nShunya pratirodh wale adarsh prerak ka sw-prerakatva kya hai?
e: Depends only on geometric factors. / Sirf jyamitiya karako par nirbhar.

q: Which 'Rule' gives the direction of 'Induced current'?\n'Prerit dhara' ki disha kaun sa niyam deta hai?
e: Always opposes the change that caused it. / Hamesha badlav ka virodh karti hai.

q: What is 'Coercivity' of soft iron?\nNarm lohe ki 'nigrahita' (Coercivity) kaisi hoti hai?
e: Easy to demagnetize. / Vichumbakit karna aasan hai.

q: Which part of ear is 'Hammer' bone?\n'Hammer' haddi kaan ke kis bhag mein hoti hai?
e: Revision point. / Revision point.

q: What is 'Magnetic Potential' unit?\n'Chumbakiya vibhav' ki ikai kya hai?
e: Analogous to electric potential. / Vidyut vibhav ke saman.

q: What is 'Tesla' in terms of Gauss?\n'Tesla' Gauss ke sandarbh mein kya hai?
e: 1 Tesla = 10,000 Gauss.

q: What is 'Curie's Law' constant unit?\n'Curie ke niyam' ke niyatank ki ikai kya hai?
e: From $\chi = C/T$. / $\chi = C/T$ se.

q: Which part of ear is 'Pinna'?\nKaan ka 'Pinna' kaun sa bhag hai?
e: Revision Point. / Revision point.

q: What is the speed of light in vacuum related to $\mu_0$?\nNirvat mein prakash ki chaal $\mu_0$ se kaise judi hai?
e: Fundamental electromagnetic relation. / Maulik sambandh.

q: What is 'Flux Leakage' in a transformer?\nTransformer mein 'flux leakage' kya hai?
o: Loss of energy | Oorja ki hani
e: Primary flux not linking secondary. / Primary flux ka secondary se na judna.

q: Which material is used for 'Magnetic Shielding'?\n'Chumbakiya parirakshan' ke liye kya upyog hota hai?
e: High permeability alloy. / Uchh pargamyata wali mishra-dhatu.

q: What is 'Relative Permeability' of a superconductor?\nSuperconductor ki 'sapeksh pargamyata' kya hoti hai?
e: Perfect diamagnetism results in zero permeability. / Purn prati-chumbaktva ke karan shunya pargamyata.

q: What is 'Mutual Inductance' of two coils if current changes by 2A/s and EMF is 10V?\nDo coils ka anyonya prerakatva kya hai yadi current 2A/s se badle aur EMF 10V ho?
Which 'Rule' gives the direction of force on a moving charge?\nGatiman avesh par bal ki disha kaun sa niyam deta hai?
o: Fleming's Left-hand rule | Fleming ka baayein hath ka niyam
e: Thumb = Force, Forefinger = Field. / Angutha = bal, tarjani = kshetra.

q: What is 'Magnetic Induction' at center of circular loop?\nVrittakar loop ke kendra par chumbakiya preran kya hai?
e: Strongest field is at the center. / Kendra par kshetra sabse mazboot hota hai.

q: What is the 'Flux' linkage for 100 turns if each has 0.2 Weber flux?\n100 phero ka flux linkage kya hoga yadi har phere mein 0.2 Weber hai?
What is 'Barkhausen Effect' evidence of?\n'Barkhausen effect' kiska praman hai?
e: Shows domain alignment steps. / Domain sanrekhan dikhata hai.

q: What is 'Magnetic Susceptibility' of 'Antimony'?\n'Antimony' ki chumbakiya pravritti kya hai?
e: It is a diamagnetic substance. / Ye ek prati-chumbakiya padarth hai.

q: Which material is used for 'Permanent Magnets' like Alnico?\nAlnico jaise sthayi chumbak ke liye kya zaruri hai?
o: High retentivity and high coercivity | Uchh dharanshilta aur uchh nigrahita
e: Ensures magnet stays strong. / Chumbak ko mazboot banaye rakhta hai.

q: What is 'Agonic Line'?\n'Agonic line' kya hai?
e: Joins places where magnetic north is same as true north. / Shunya dikpat wale sthano ko jodti hai.

q: What is 'Magnetic Flux' unit in SI?\nSI mein 'Chumbakiya flux' ki ikai kya hai?
e: Standard SI unit. / Manak SI ikai.

q: What is 'Self Inductance' of a long solenoid proportional to?\nSolenoid ka sw-prerakatva kiske samanupati hai?
e: Increases with square of turns. / Phero ke varg ke saath badhta hai.

q: What is 'Hysteresis Loop' area for steel compared to soft iron?\nSteel ka hysteresis loop narm lohe ki tulna mein kaisa hai?
e: Steel has more energy loss. / Steel mein zyada oorja hani hoti hai.

q: What is the speed of sound in 'Hydrogen'?\n'Hydrogen' mein dhwani ki chaal kya hai?
e: Revision Point. / Revision point.

q: Which 'Rule' gives the direction of magnetic field for a solenoid?\nSolenoid ke liye chumbakiya kshetra ki disha kaun sa niyam deta hai?
o: Right-hand Palm rule | Dayein hath ki hatheli ka niyam
e: Thumb = North pole, Fingers = Current. / Angutha = uttar dhruv.

q: What is 'Tesla' unit for?\n'Tesla' kiski ikai hai?
e: SI unit of flux density. / Flux ghnatv ki SI ikai.

q: Which part of ear is 'Snail shaped'?\nKaan ka kaun sa bhag 'ghonghe ke aakar' ka hai?
e: Revision point. / Revision point.

q: What is 'Self Inductance' of a straight wire?\nSeedhe tar ka sw-prerakatva kya hai?
e: Inductance requires a flux link via loop. / Prerakatva ke liye loop chahiye.

q: What is 'Magnetic Susceptibility' of 'Liquid Oxygen'?\n'Liquid oxygen' ki chumbakiya pravritti kya hai?
e: It is paramagnetic. / Ye anu-chumbakiya hai.

q: Which 'Rare Earth' element is used to make the strongest permanent magnets?\nSabse shaktishali sthayi chumbak banane ke liye kis 'Rare Earth' tatva ka upyog hota hai?
e: Neodymium-Iron-Boron (NdFeB) magnets are the strongest known permanent magnets. / Neodymium chumbak sabse shaktishali hote hain.

q: What is 'Magnetic Polar Reversal' (Geomagnetic Reversal)?\n'Chumbakiya dhruv ulatna' (Geomagnetic Reversal) kya hai?
o: Change in Earth's field direction | Prithvi ke kshetra ki disha badalna
e: A change in Earth's magnetic field such that the positions of magnetic north and south are interchanged. / Prithvi ke uttar aur dakshin chumbakiya dhruvon ka aapas mein badal jana.

q: What is 'Magnetic Susceptibility' ($\chi$) for a 'Paramagnetic' material at very high temperatures?\nBahut uchh tapman par 'Anu-chumbakiya' padarth ki 'chumbakiya pravritti' ($\chi$) kaisi hoti hai?
e: As per Curie's Law, susceptibility is inversely proportional to temperature. / Tapman badhne par pravritti ghat jati hai.

q: What is 'Ferrite' used in high-frequency applications?\nUchh-aavritti (High-frequency) upyog mein 'Ferrite' kya hai?
e: Ferrites are ceramic materials with high permeability but very low electrical conductivity. / Ferrites ki chalakta kam hoti hai isliye eddy current nuksan kam hota hai.

q: Which part of ear converts sound pressure waves into fluid waves?\nKaan ka kaun sa bhag dhwani dabav tarango ko drav tarango mein badalta hai?
e: Vibrations of stapes against the oval window move the fluid in the cochlea. / Stapes ki halchal se cochlea ke drav mein tarangein banti hain.

q: What is the 'SI Unit' of Magnetic Permeability of a medium?\nKisi madhyam ki chumbakiya pargamyata ki 'SI ikai' kya hai?
e: Permeability ($\mu$) is measured in Henry per meter. / Pargamyata ki ikai Henry prati meter hai.

q: What is 'Magnetic Saturation'?\n'Chumbakiya santripti' (Magnetic Saturation) kya hai?
o: Maximum magnetization limit | Chumbakan ki adhiktam seema
e: State where all magnetic domains are aligned and no further magnetization is possible. / Wo avastha jahan saare domains ek disha mein ho jayein.

q: What is the relation between 'Magnetic Moment' ($M$) and 'Pole Strength' ($m$)?\n'Chumbakiya aghurn' (M) aur 'Dhruv shakti' (m) ke beech kya sambandh hai?
e: Magnetic moment is the product of pole strength and effective length. / Chumbakiya aghurn dhruv shakti aur lambai ka gunanphal hai.

q: Which material is 'Weakly Repelled' by a magnetic field?\nChumbakiya kshetra dwara kaun sa padarth 'kamzori se pratikarshit' hota hai?
e: Diamagnetic materials like Bismuth are repelled by magnetic fields. / Prati-chumbakiya padarth kshetra se door bhagte hain.

q: What is 'Magnetic Susceptibility' ($\chi$) of 'Ferromagnetic' materials approx?\n'Lauh-chumbakiya' padarthon ki 'chumbakiya pravritti' ($\chi$) lagbhag kitni hoti hai?
e: They have very high susceptibility as they are easily magnetized. / Inki pravritti bahut adhik hoti hai.

q: Which rule is used to find the direction of force on a current-carrying conductor in a field?\nKshetra mein dharavahi chalak par lagne wale bal ki disha kaun sa niyam deta hai?
o: Fleming's Left-hand rule | Fleming ka baayein hath ka niyam
e: Used for motors. / Motor ke liye upyog hota hai.

q: What happens to the 'Magnetic Field' at the center of a circular coil if current is tripled?\nYadi dhara (current) ko teen guna kar diya jaye, toh vrittakar coil ke kendra par chumbakiya kshetra kya hoga?
e: $B \propto I$. Field increases linearly with current. / Chumbakiya kshetra dhara ke samanupati hota hai.

q: What is 'Self Inductance' of a coil dependent on?\nEk coil ka 'sw-prerakatva' kis par nirbhar karta hai?
o: Geometry and Core material | Jyamiti aur Core padarth
e: Depends on number of turns, area, length, and permeability of core. / Ye phero ki sankhya, kshetraphal, lambai aur core par nirbhar karta hai.

q: What is 'Tesla' equivalent to in terms of 'Weber'?\n'Tesla' Weber ke sandarbh mein kiske barabar hai?
e: Flux per unit area is called magnetic induction (Tesla). / Prati ikai kshetraphal flux ko Tesla kehte hain.

q: Which part of ear is the 'Hammer' bone located in?\n'Hammer' haddi kaan ke kis bhag mein hoti hai?
e: Revision: First of the three ossicles (Malleus). / Revision point.

q: What is 'Magnetic Intensity' (H) at the center of a solenoid with $N$ turns, length $L$ and current $I$?\nSolenoid ke kendra par 'chumbakiya teevrata' (H) kya hai?
e: H is independent of the medium inside the solenoid. / H core material par nirbhar nahi karta.

q: What is the speed of EM waves in vacuum formula?\nNirvat mein EM tarango ki chaal ka sutra kya hai?
e: Fundamental electromagnetic relation. / Maulik sambandh.

q: What is 'Hysteresis Loop' area representing energy loss as?\nHysteresis loop ka kshetraphal oorja hani ko kis roop mein darshata hai?
e: Represents heat dissipated per unit volume per cycle. / Prati chakra prati ikai aaytan nikalne wali ushma.

q: What is the 'Flux' linkage for a coil of 100 turns if each has 0.1 Wb flux?\n100 phero ka flux linkage kya hoga yadi har phere mein 0.1 Wb hai?
e: Flux linkage = $100 \times 0.1 = 10$. / Kul flux linkage.

q: Which device uses 'Mutual Induction' to change AC voltage levels?\nAC voltage badalne ke liye kaun sa upkaran 'anyonya preran' ka upyog karta hai?
e: Transfers energy between two coils via changing magnetic flux. / Badalte flux ke madyam se oorja sthanantaran.

q: What is 'Relative Permeability' ($\mu_r$) for air approx?\nHawa ke liye 'sapeksh pargamyata' lagbhag kya hai?
e: Air has permeability very close to vacuum. / Hawa ki pargamyata nirvat ke barabar hoti hai.

q: What is 'Curie's Law' for paramagnetic substances?\nAnu-chumbakiya padarthon ke liye 'Curie ka niyam' kya hai?
e: Susceptibility decreases as temperature increases. / Tapman badhne par pravritti ghat-ti hai.

q: What is the unit of 'Magnetic Flux' in CGS system?\nCGS mein 'chumbakiya flux' ki ikai kya hai?
e: $1 Weber = 10^8 Maxwell$.

q: What is 'Aclinic Line' joining points of?\n'Aclinic line' kin binduon ko jodti hai?
o: Zero Dip | Shunya nati kon (Zero Dip)
e: Also called the Magnetic Equator. / Ise chumbakiya bhumadhya rekha kehte hain.

q: Which material is used for 'Magnetic recording' on credit cards?\nCredit cards par 'chumbakiya recording' ke liye kya upyog hota hai?
e: Magnetic strips use hard magnetic materials like barium ferrite. / Credit card ki strip mein ferrite ka upyog hota hai.

q: What is 'Tesla' in terms of 'Newton, Ampere, Meter'?\n'Tesla' Newton, Ampere, Meter ke sandarbh mein kya hai?
e: From $F = BIL \implies B = F/IL$. / Sutra $B = F/IL$ se vyutpann.

q: What is 'Coercivity' of 'Steel' compared to 'Soft Iron'?\n'Steel' ki 'nigrahita' narm lohe ki tulna mein kaisi hai?

q: What is 'Barkhausen Effect' evidence of?\n'Barkhausen Effect' kiska praman hai?

q: Which part of ear is 'Pinna'?\nKaan ka 'Pinna' kaun sa bhag hai?
e: Revision: Collects sound waves from surroundings. / Revision point.

e: Fundamental relation in magnetic media. / Chumbakiya madhyam mein बुनियादी sambandh.

q: What is the speed of sound in 'Vacuum'?\n'Nirvat' mein dhwani ki chaal kya hai?
e: Revision: Sound requires a medium. / Revision: Dhwani ko madhyam chahiye.

q: What is 'Self Inductance' of an ideal inductor with zero resistance?\nShunya pratirodh wale adarsh prerak ka sw-prerakatva kya hai?
e: Depends only on its geometry. / Sirf uski jyamiti par nirbhar karta hai.

q: What is 'Mutual Inductance' of two coils if current changes by 2A/s and EMF is 10V?\nDo coils ka anyonya prerakatva kya hoga yadi current 2A/s se badle aur EMF 10V ho?
Which rule gives the direction of 'Induced Current'?\n'Prerit dhara' ki disha kaun sa niyam deta hai?
e: Always opposes the change that caused it. / Hamesha badlav ka virodh karti hai.

q: What is 'Magnetic Susceptibility' of 'Antimony'?\n'Antimony' ki chumbakiya pravritti kya hai?
e: It is a diamagnetic substance. / Ye ek prati-chumbakiya padarth hai.

q: What is 'Relative Permeability' of a 'Superconductor'?\n'Superconductor' ki 'sapeksh pargamyata' kya hoti hai?
e: Perfect diamagnetism results in zero permeability. / Purn prati-chumbaktva ke karan pargamyata shunya hoti hai.

q: What is 'Flux Leakage' in a transformer?\nTransformer mein 'flux leakage' kya hai?
o: Loss of energy | Oorja ki hani
e: Primary flux not linking secondary coil. / Primary flux ka secondary se na judna.

q: Which material is used for 'Magnetic Shielding'?\n'Chumbakiya parirakshan' ke liye kya upyog hota hai?
e: Alloy with very high permeability. / Bahut uchh pargamyata wali mishra dhatu.

q: What is 'Coercivity' of soft iron?\nNarm lohe ki 'nigrahita' kaisi hoti hai?
e: Easy to demagnetize, ideal for electromagnets. / Vichumbakit karna aasan hai.

q: Which part of ear is 'Snail shaped'?\nKaan ka kaun sa bhag 'ghonghe ke aakar' ka hai?
e: Revision Point. / Revision point.

q: What is 'Self Inductance' of a straight wire?\nSeedhe tar ka sw-prerakatva kya hai?
e: Requires a loop to link flux effectively. / Flux linkage ke liye loop chahiye.

q: What is 'Tesla' unit for?\n'Tesla' kiski ikai hai?
e: Standard SI unit for flux density. / SI unit for B.

q: What is 'Magnetic Susceptibility' of 'Liquid Oxygen'?\n'Liquid oxygen' ki chumbakiya pravritti kya hai?
e: Oxygen is paramagnetic. / Oxygen anu-chumbakiya hai.

q: Which 'Rule' gives the direction of magnetic field for a solenoid?\nSolenoid ke liye chumbakiya kshetra ki disha kaun sa niyam deta hai?
o: Right-hand Palm rule | Dayein hath ki hatheli ka niyam
e: Thumb = North pole, Fingers = Current. / Angutha uttar dhruv batata hai.

q: What is the number of questions completed in Magnetism now?\nAb tak magnetism mein kul kitne prashn poore huye?

q: What is 'Curie Temperature' of 'Gadolinium' approx?\n'Gadolinium' ka Curie tapman lagbhag kya hai?
e: It is ferromagnetic below room temperature. / Ye kamre ke tapman se niche lauh-chumbakiya hota hai.

q: What is 'Magnetic Anisotropy'?\n'Chumbakiya Anisotropy' kya hai?

q: What is the equivalent inductance of two inductors in 'Parallel'?\nSamantar jude do prerakon ka tulyak prerakatva kya hai?
e: Follows the reciprocal rule. / Vyutkram niyam ka palan karta hai.

q: What is the speed of light in vacuum approx?\nNirvat mein prakash ki chaal lagbhag kya hai?
e: Revision: Speed of all EM waves. / Revision point.

q: What happens to the 'Magnetic Susceptibility' of a paramagnetic material as it approaches 'Absolute Zero'?\nParamagnetic padarth ki 'chumbakiya pravritti' ka kya hota hai jab ye 'param shunya' (Absolute Zero) ke paas pahunchta hai?
o: Increases infinitely (ideally) | Anant roop se badhti hai
e: According to Curie's Law ($\chi \propto 1/T$), as T decreases, susceptibility increases. / Curie ke niyam ke anusar, tapman ghatne par pravritti badhti hai.

q: Which planet in our solar system has the 'Strongest' magnetic field?\nHamare saur mandal ke kis grah ka 'chumbakiya kshetra' sabse shaktishali hai?
e: Jupiter's magnetic field is about 14 times stronger than Earth's. / Brihaspati ka chumbakiya kshetra prithvi se 14 guna shaktishali hai.

q: What is the 'Efficiency' of a transformer if output power is 900W and input power is 1000W?\nYadi output shakti 900W aur input 1000W ho, toh transformer ki 'dakshta' kya hogi?
e: Efficiency = (Output/Input) x 100 = (900/1000) x 100 = 90%. / Dakshta sutra: (Output/Input) x 100.

q: Which 'Part' of the sun is responsible for generating its magnetic field?\nSurya ka kaun sa 'bhag' uska chumbakiya kshetra paida karne ke liye zimmedar hai?
e: Generated by the motion of plasma in the solar interior (Solar Dynamo). / Surya ke aantrik plasma ki halchal se paida hota hai.

q: What is 'Magnetic Pressure'?\n'Chumbakiya dabav' (Magnetic Pressure) kya hai?
o: Energy density of magnetic field | Chumbakiya kshetra ka oorja ghnatv
e: Magnetic pressure is equivalent to the energy density $B^2/2\mu_0$. / Ye $B^2/2\mu_0$ ke barabar hota hai.

q: What is the unit of 'Magnetic Rigidity'?\n'Chumbakiya dridhta' (Magnetic Rigidity) ki ikai kya hai?
e: Rigidity (R) = B x r (Magnetic field times radius of curvature). / Ise T-m mein maapa jata hai.

q: Which part of ear is the 'Ancus' (Incus) bone located in?\n'Ancus' (Incus) haddi kaan ke kis bhag mein hoti hai?
e: Revision: Middle ear ossicle. / Revision point.

q: What is 'Magnetic Reynolds Number' used in?\n'Chumbakiya Reynolds sankhya' ka upyog kisme hota hai?

q: What is the 'SI Unit' of Magnetic Vector Potential?\n'Chumbakiya vector vibhav' ki SI ikai kya hai?
e: Unit of A is Weber/meter or Tesla-meter. / A ki ikai Weber/meter hoti hai.

q: What happens to the 'Magnetic Field' at the center of a solenoid if a copper rod is inserted?\nYadi solenoid mein 'tambe' ki rod daali jaye toh chumbakiya kshetra ka kya hoga?

e: Oxygen gas is paramagnetic. / Oxygen gas anu-chumbakiya hoti hai.

e: It is paramagnetic. / ye anu-chumbakiya hai.

q: What is 'Coercivity' of soft iron?\nsoft iron ki 'nigrahita' kaisi hoti hai?
e: Easy to demagnetize. / vichumbakit karna aasan hai.

q: What is the magnetism target completed now?\nmagnetism mein ab tak kitne prashn poore huye?
e: 900 questions done! Final 100 remaining. / 900 prashn poore! aakhri 100 bache hain.

q: What is 'Tesla' in terms of Weber?\nWeber ke sandarbh mein 'Tesla' kya hai?
e: Flux per unit area.

q: What is 'Relative Permeability' ($\mu_r$) for a vacuum?\nnirvat ki sapeksh pargamyata kya hai?
e: Standard definition.

q: Which material shows 'Ferrimagnetism'?\nkaun sa padarth 'ferrimagnetism' dikhata hai?
e: Unequal opposite moments.

q: What is 'Magnetic Intensity' (H) independent of?\n'chumbakiya teevrata' (H) kisse swatantra hai?
e: H depends on I and n only.

q: What is 'Hysteresis Loop' area energy loss form?\nhysteresis loop area oorja hani ka roop kya hai?
e: Lost as thermal energy. / ushmiya oorja ke roop mein hani.

q: What is the full form of 'SQUID' in magnetic measurements?\nचुंबकीय मापन में 'SQUID' का पूर्ण रूप क्या है?
o: Superconducting Quantum Interference Device | Superconducting Quantum Interference Device
e: SQUIDs are extremely sensitive magnetometers used to measure very weak magnetic fields. / SQUID बहुत कमजोर चुंबकीय क्षेत्रों को मापने के लिए उपयोग किए जाने वाले संवेदनशील मैग्नेटोमीटर हैं।

q: Which 'Effect' is the working principle of SQUIDs?\nSQUIDs के कार्य करने का सिद्धांत किस 'प्रभाव' पर आधारित है?
e: It involves the tunneling of Cooper pairs across a thin insulating barrier between two superconductors. / इसमें दो अतिचालकों के बीच एक पतली बाधा के माध्यम से कूपर जोड़ों का टनलिंग शामिल है।

q: What is 'Magnetohydrodynamics' (MHD) the study of?\n'मैग्नेटोहाइड्रोडायनामिक्स' (MHD) किसका अध्ययन है?
o: Magnetic properties of electrically conducting fluids | विद्युत चालक तरल पदार्थों के चुंबकीय गुण
e: Deals with fluids like plasma, liquid metals, and salt water. / यह प्लाज्मा, तरल धातुओं और खारे पानी जैसे तरल पदार्थों से संबंधित है।

q: The 'Solar Wind' interacts with Earth's magnetic field to create:\n'सौर पवन' पृथ्वी के चुंबकीय क्षेत्र के साथ क्रिया करके क्या बनाती है?
e: The region of space surrounding Earth where its magnetic field dominates. / अंतरिक्ष का वह क्षेत्र जहां पृथ्वी का चुंबकीय क्षेत्र प्रभावी होता है।

q: What is 'Magnetic Pressure' in a plasma context?\nप्लाज्मा के संदर्भ में 'चुंबकीय दबाव' क्या है?
o: Energy density of the magnetic field ($B^2/2\mu_0$) | चुंबकीय क्षेत्र का ऊर्जा घनत्व
e: Forces acting on the plasma due to the magnetic field gradient. / चुंबकीय क्षेत्र प्रवणता के कारण प्लाज्मा पर लगने वाला बल।

q: What is the 'SI Unit' of Magnetic Susceptibility per unit volume?\nप्रति इकाई आयतन चुंबकीय प्रवृत्ति की 'SI इकाई' क्या है?
e: Volume susceptibility is a pure ratio. / आयतन प्रवृत्ति एक शुद्ध अनुपात है।

q: What happens to the 'Critical Field' ($B_c$) of a superconductor as temperature increases?\nतापमान बढ़ने पर अतिचालक के 'क्रांतिक क्षेत्र' ($B_c$) का क्या होता है?
e: The critical field required to destroy superconductivity drops to zero at $T_c$. / $T_c$ पर अतिचालकता नष्ट करने के लिए आवश्यक क्षेत्र शून्य हो जाता है।

q: Which part of ear is responsible for balance and orientation?\nकान का कौन सा भाग संतुलन और अभिविन्यास के लिए जिम्मेदार है?
e: Magnetism quiz revision: Part of vestibular system. / रिवीजन: वेस्टिबुलर सिस्टम का हिस्सा।

q: What is 'Ferrimagnetic' material's net magnetic moment?\n'फेरीमैग्नेटिक' पदार्थ का शुद्ध चुंबकीय आघूर्ण क्या होता है?
o: Large and Non-zero | बड़ा और गैर-शून्य
e: Unlike antiferromagnets, the opposing moments do not fully cancel. / एंटीफेरोमैग्नेट्स के विपरीत, इसमें विरोधी आघूर्ण पूरी तरह से समाप्त नहीं होते।

q: What is 'Curie Temperature' of 'Gadolinium' approx?\n'गैडोलीनियम' का 'क्यूरी तापमान' लगभग क्या है?
e: Gadolinium is ferromagnetic only below room temperature. / गैडोलीनियम केवल कमरे के तापमान से नीचे लौह-चुंबकीय होता है।

q: Which 'Law' is used to determine the path of cosmic rays in Earth's field?\nपृथ्वी के क्षेत्र में ब्रह्मांडीय किरणों (Cosmic rays) के पथ को निर्धारित करने के लिए किस 'नियम' का उपयोग होता है?
o: Lorentz Force Law | लोरेंट्ज़ बल नियम
e: $F = q(v \times B)$. Deflects charged particles away from the equator. / आवेशित कणों को भूमध्य रेखा से दूर विक्षेपित करता है।

q: What is 'Magnetic Bottling'?\n'मैग्नेटिक बॉटलिंग' क्या है?
o: Confining plasma using magnetic fields | चुंबकीय क्षेत्रों का उपयोग करके प्लाज्मा को रोकना
e: Used in fusion reactors to keep hot plasma away from walls. / फ्यूजन रिएक्टरों में गर्म प्लाज्मा को दीवारों से दूर रखने के लिए उपयोग किया जाता है।

q: The 'Speed of Sound' in air at 0°C is approx:\n0°C पर हवा में 'ध्वनि की चाल' लगभग है:
e: Sound Set Revision Point. / साउंड सेट रिवीजन पॉइंट।

q: What is the 'Unit' of Magnetomotive Force (mmf)?\nचुंबकीय वाहक बल (mmf) की 'इकाई' क्या है?
e: Product of number of turns and current ($N \times I$). / फेरों की संख्या और करंट का गुणनफल।

q: What is the relation between 'Permeability' and 'Susceptibility'?\n'पारगम्यता' और 'प्रवृत्ति' के बीच क्या संबंध है?
e: Relative permeability is susceptibility plus one. / सापेक्ष पारगम्यता प्रवृत्ति और एक का योग है।

q: Which material has 'Highest' susceptibility among common elements?\nसामान्य तत्वों में किस पदार्थ की प्रवृत्ति 'उच्चतम' है?
e: Iron has the highest room temperature magnetic susceptibility. / लोहे की कमरे के तापमान पर चुंबकीय प्रवृत्ति सबसे अधिक होती है।

q: What is 'Self Inductance' of a coil if it induces 10V when current changes at 2 A/s?\nयदि करंट 2 A/s की दर से बदलता है और 10V प्रेरित होता है, तो कुंडली का 'स्व-प्रेरकत्व' क्या है?
e: $10 / 2 = 5$ Henry. / गणना सूत्र के अनुसार।

q: What is 'Mutual Inductance' (M) unit in terms of 'Weber/Ampere'?\n'वेबर/एम्पीयर' के संदर्भ में 'अन्योन्य प्रेरकत्व' (M) की इकाई क्या है?
e: Both self and mutual inductance share the unit Henry ($1 H = 1 Wb/A$). / दोनों का मात्रक हेनरी ही होता है।

q: What is the 'Flux' through a loop if area vector is perpendicular to magnetic field?\nयदि क्षेत्रफल सदिश चुंबकीय क्षेत्र के लंबवत है, तो लूप के माध्यम से 'फ्लक्स' क्या है?
e: $\Phi = BA \cos 90^\circ = 0$. / चूंकि cos 90 शून्य होता है।

q: Which 'Rule' gives the direction of magnetic field around a straight current wire?\nसीधे करंट वाले तार के चारों ओर चुंबकीय क्षेत्र की दिशा कौन सा 'नियम' देता है?
o: Right-hand Thumb Rule | दाएं हाथ के अंगूठे का नियम
e: Thumb points to current, fingers indicate field circles. / अंगूठा करंट की ओर, उंगलियां क्षेत्र दर्शाती हैं।

q: What is 'Magnetic Hysteresis' area representing energy loss as?\nहिस्टेरेसिस क्षेत्रफल ऊर्जा हानि को किस रूप में दर्शाता है?
e: Work done against internal domain friction. / आंतरिक डोमेन घर्षण के विरुद्ध किया गया कार्य।

q: What is 'Aclinic Line'?\n'एक्लिनिक रेखा' क्या है?
o: Zero Dip (Magnetic Equator) | शून्य नति (चुंबकीय भूमध्य रेखा)
e: Joins places with zero magnetic dip. / शून्य चुंबकीय झुकाव वाले स्थानों को जोड़ती है।

q: What is the value of 'Earth's Magnetic Field' at the surface approx?\nपृथ्वी की सतह पर 'चुंबकीय क्षेत्र' का अनुमानित मान क्या है?
e: Varies between 0.25 to 0.65 Gauss. / 0.25 से 0.65 गॉस के बीच होता है।

q: What is 'Tesla' in terms of Gauss?\nगॉस के संदर्भ में 'टेस्ला' क्या है?
Which 'Substance' has susceptibility $\chi < 0$?\nकिस 'पदार्थ' की प्रवृत्ति $\chi < 0$ होती है?
e: Diamagnetic materials like Copper and Water. / तांबा और पानी जैसे प्रति-चुंबकीय पदार्थ।

q: Which part of ear is the 'Hammer'?\nकान का कौन सा भाग 'हैमर' है?
e: Part of ossicles (Malleus). / मध्य कान की हड्डी।

q: What is 'Step-up Transformer' function?\n'स्टेप-अप ट्रांसफार्मर' का कार्य क्या है?
e: Primary turns < Secondary turns. / प्राइमरी फेरे < सेकेंडरी फेरे।

q: What is 'Step-down Transformer' turns ratio ($N_s/N_p$)?\n'स्टेप-डाउन ट्रांसफार्मर' फेरों का अनुपात ($N_s/N_p$) क्या है?
e: Secondary has fewer turns to lower voltage. / वोल्टेज कम करने के लिए कम फेरे।

q: What is 'Magnetic Susceptibility' of 'Antimony'?\n'एंटीमनी' की चुंबकीय प्रवृत्ति क्या है?
e: Antimony is a diamagnetic material. / एंटीमनी एक प्रति-चुंबकीय पदार्थ है।

q: What is 'Self Inductance' of a straight wire approx?\nएक सीधे तार का 'स्व-प्रेरकत्व' लगभग क्या होता है?
e: Inductance requires a loop to capture flux effectively. / प्रभावी रूप से फ्लक्स पकड़ने के लिए लूप की आवश्यकता होती है।

q: What is 'Flux' linkage for 100 turns if each has 0.2 Wb?\n100 फेरों के लिए फ्लक्स लिंकेज क्या होगा यदि प्रत्येक में 0.2 Wb है?
e: Total linkage = $N\Phi$. / कुल लिंकेज $N\Phi$ है।

q: Which material is used for 'Magnetic Shielding'?\n'चुंबकीय परिरक्षण' के लिए किस सामग्री का उपयोग होता है?
e: High permeability alloy. / उच्च पारगम्यता वाली मिश्र धातु।

q: What is the speed of EM waves in vacuum approx?\nनिर्वात में EM तरंगों की चाल लगभग क्या है?
e: Constant for all electromagnetic radiations. / सभी विद्युत चुंबकीय विकिरणों के लिए नियत।

q: What is 'Mutual Inductance' of two coils if current changes by 5A/s and EMF is 25V?\nदो कुंडलियों का अन्योन्य प्रेरकत्व क्या होगा यदि करंट 5A/s से बदलता है और EMF 25V है?
e: $25 / 5 = 5$ Henry. / गणना सूत्र के अनुसार।

q: Which part of ear is 'Snail shaped'?\nकान का कौन सा भाग 'घोंघे के आकार' का है?
e: Contains organ of Corti. / इसमें कॉर्टी का अंग होता है।

q: What is the unit of 'Permeability' of free space ($\mu_0$)?\nमुक्त स्थान की 'पारगम्यता' ($\mu_0$) की इकाई क्या है?
e: Standard magnetic constant unit. / मानक चुंबकीय नियतांक इकाई।

q: What is 'Tesla' in base SI units?\nमूल SI इकाइयों में 'टेस्ला' क्या है?
e: Derived from $F/qv$. / सूत्र $F/qv$ से व्युत्पन्न।

q: What is the frequency of 'Household AC' in India?\nभारत में 'घरेलू AC' की आवृत्ति क्या है?
e: Standard utility frequency. / मानक उपयोगिता आवृत्ति।

q: Which 'Rule' gives the direction of 'Induced current'?\n'प्रेरित धारा' की दिशा कौन सा 'नियम' देता है?
e: Always opposes the change that caused it. / हमेशा उस परिवर्तन का विरोध करता है जो इसे उत्पन्न करता है।

q: What is 'Barkhausen Effect' evidence of?\n'बरखौसेन प्रभाव' किसका प्रमाण है?
e: Discontinuous realignment of domains. / डोमेन का विच्छिन्न पुनर्गठन।

q: What is 'Magnetic Intensity' (H) independent of?\n'चुंबकीय तीव्रता' (H) किससे स्वतंत्र है?
e: Depends only on excitation current and geometry. / केवल उत्तेजना करंट और ज्यामिति पर निर्भर करता है।
